    I

    IFinalController - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result
    Interface that defines the required navigation actions for the final results controller.
    IGameController - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game
    Interface that defines the required actions for the game controller.
    IGameLogic - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic
    Interface that defines the required operations for game logic management.
    IGameTimer - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer
    Interface that defines the required operations for a game countdown timer.
    incrementPoints() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic.GameLogic
    Increments the player's level by one after a correct answer.
    incrementPoints() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.gameLogic.IGameLogic
    Increments the player's level or score by one.
    initialize() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Initializes the game controller after the FXML is loaded.
    initialize() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.IGameController
    Initializes the game view and sets up all required components.
    IWelcomeController - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.controller.welcome
    Interface that defines the required actions for the welcome screen controller.
    IWords - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.model.words
    Interface that defines the required operations for word management.
